entries.name: akm-quickstart
entries.description: Use when an environment needs akm installed, initialized, and verified before any other akm action.

entries.name: install-akm-stash
entries.description: Use when the user wants to add a stash source or clone a specific akm asset into the working stash.

entries.name: publish-akm-stash
entries.description: Use when a team wants to publish a stash with strong metadata and current akm v0.7.0 conventions.

entries.name: manage-akm-proposals
entries.description: Use when a pending proposal needs review, acceptance, or rejection in akm-cli v0.7.0.

entries.name: distill-feedback-into-lessons
entries.description: Use when repeated feedback should become a reusable lesson through akm distill and the proposal queue.

entries.name: scan-session-logs
entries.description: Use when an agent needs to scan user directories for opencode, Claude, or akm logs and normalize the extracted signals.

entries.name: harvest-session-knowledge
entries.description: Use when normalized session-log evidence should be deduplicated, prioritized, and submitted to the akm proposal queue.
